title: EXTRACT(SECOND FROM timestamp) always returns 0 integer seconds part.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (event_time, description) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2011-03-10 09:30:42.246', 'Event A');
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (event_time, description) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2022-12-31 23:59:59.999', 'Event B');
SELECT id, EXTRACT(SECOND FROM event_time) AS seconds_part FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(SECOND FROM event_time) AS seconds_part FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2012-01-01 00:00:00';
key_bug_features: EXTRACT function returns 0 for seconds part
